title: Argentinian Custard Cake
description: A rich and creamy cake from Argentina, featuring a custard-like filling and a delicate crust.
instructions: Prepare the vanilla cake mix according to the package instructions.
Pour the cake batter into a greased 8-inch round cake pan.
Bake the cake for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Allow the cake to cool completely.
In a separate bowl, whip the rich custard until smooth.
Fold in the heavy cream and vanilla extract.
Spread the custard mixture evenly over the cooled cake.
Melt the unsalted butter and brush it over the top of the cake.
Return the cake to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the custard is lightly browned.
Remove the cake from the oven and let it cool completely before serving.
